productName: Slab Hash Rosin - Acai Berry Gelato - 1g (S)
description: Hand-pressed hybrid rosin from Acai Berry Gelato — solventless, full-spectrum, and prized by flavor chasers for a taste that stays honest to the living bud. Expect with notes of tar, berry, and tree fruit, a rich terpene punch, and a versatile, anytime balance.
